assertion_results.text: The response describes locating the digest comment using the marker string '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest:' from shared/description-digest-protocol.md
assertion_results.evidence: digest-match.md line 27: 'Search through the returned comments for any whose body starts with the marker string `[sdlc-workflow] Description digest:` as defined in the shared description-digest-protocol.' plan.md line 55 also states: 'Locate the digest comment -- one comment found with body starting with `[sdlc-workflow] Description digest:`'. Both files explicitly reference the marker string and the shared protocol.

assertion_results.text: The response describes computing a digest of the current description (using scripts/sha256-digest.py or SHA-256) and comparing it with the stored digest
assertion_results.evidence: digest-match.md lines 52-61 describe computing the current digest: 'Write it to a temporary file and compute the digest using the project's script: python3 scripts/sha256-digest.py /tmp/desc-TC-9201.txt'. Lines 71-73 describe comparing: 'The stored hex digest is ... and the computed hex digest is ... -- they match.' plan.md lines 58-59 confirm: 'Compute current digest: write description to `/tmp/desc-TC-9201.txt`, run `python3 scripts/sha256-digest.py /tmp/desc-TC-9201.txt`' and line 61: 'Compare hex digests: match confirmed'.

assertion_results.text: The response confirms the digests match and states it will proceed silently without prompting the user — no additional latency for the happy path
assertion_results.evidence: digest-match.md lines 75-81: 'Outcome: Match -- Proceed Silently' and 'No user prompt is displayed. No warning is logged. No additional latency is introduced. Execution proceeds directly to Step 2 (Verify Dependencies) without any pause or notification to the user.' plan.md line 62: 'Result: Digests match. Proceed silently to Step 2 with no user prompt and no added latency.'

assertion_results.text: The response does not alert the user or pause execution due to the digest check — it proceeds directly to subsequent steps
assertion_results.evidence: digest-match.md line 79: 'No user prompt is displayed. No warning is logged. No additional latency is introduced. Execution proceeds directly to Step 2 (Verify Dependencies) without any pause or notification to the user.' plan.md proceeds from Step 1.5 directly to Step 2 ('Verify Dependencies') at line 64 with no intervening user interaction. The mismatch behavior (lines 85-91 of digest-match.md) is described only as contrast for what 'would happen' and explicitly does not apply in this scenario.
